name: Mixed Vegetable Salad with Peanut Sauce (Gado-gado)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and press the tofu to remove excess water.
2. Cut the tofu into cubes and deep fry until golden brown.
3. In a bowl, mix the Kecap manis with oil until well combined.
4. Add the mixed vegetables to the bowl and toss gently.
5. Arrange the fried tofu cubes on top of the vegetable salad.
6. Garnish with hard-cooked eggs and fried onion flakes.
